description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the scorpil/rust:stable Docker image and defines two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job that runs `rustc --version && cargo --version` then `time cargo test --verbose --release`. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs `time cargo doc --verbose`, `cat .docs-vc-link.js >> target/doc/main.js`, `mv target/doc public`, and `echo '<!doctype html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=pub_sub"></head></html>' > public/index.html`, then publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and only runs on the master branch.
